subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of the Almighty God, the star of the Persians had set for a thousand years and more, but now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز ایزد تعالی کوکب فارسیان هزار سال و بیشی بود غروب کرده بود حال
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @call to action
